A

AbstractButton - Class in microui.core
Abstract base class for all button-like components in the microui framework.
AbstractButton(float, float, float, float) - Constructor for class microui.core.AbstractButton
Constructs an AbstractButton with specified position and dimensions.
AbstractColor - Class in microui.core.style
Abstract base class for color representations in the MicroUI framework.
AbstractColor() - Constructor for class microui.core.style.AbstractColor
Constructs an AbstractColor and registers it with the Metrics system.
AbstractEventSystem - Class in microui.event
Abstract base class for event detection systems in MicroUI.
AbstractEventSystem(SpatialView) - Constructor for class microui.event.AbstractEventSystem
Constructs an AbstractEventSystem for the specified SpatialView.
AbstractLerpedColor - Class in microui.core.style
An abstract base class for colors that interpolate between two other colors over time.
AbstractLerpedColor(AbstractColor, AbstractColor) - Constructor for class microui.core.style.AbstractLerpedColor
Constructs a new interpolated color with the specified start and end colors.
AbstractShadow - Class in microui.core.effect
Abstract base class for shadow effects that can be applied to ContentView components.
AbstractShadow() - Constructor for class microui.core.effect.AbstractShadow
Constructs an AbstractShadow with default properties.
AbstractTheme - Class in microui.core.style.theme
Abstract base class for defining color themes in the MicroUI framework.
AbstractTheme() - Constructor for class microui.core.style.theme.AbstractTheme
 
action() - Method in interface microui.event.Listener
Called when the event this listener is registered for occurs.
add(int...) - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Adds plain items with numeric titles to the menu.
add(String...) - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Adds plain items (non-menu buttons) to the menu.
add(String, Listener) - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Adds a plain item with a click listener to the menu.
add(String, PImage, Listener) - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Adds a plain item with an icon and click listener to the menu.
add(Container) - Method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Adds a container to the manager.
add(Container, int) - Method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Adds a container to the manager with a numeric ID.
add(Container, String) - Method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Adds a container to the manager with a text ID.
add(ContentView, LayoutParams) - Method in class microui.core.base.Container
Adds a ContentView to the container with specified layout parameters.
add(ContentView, LayoutParams, int) - Method in class microui.core.base.Container
Adds a ContentView to the container with specified layout parameters and numeric ID.
add(ContentView, LayoutParams, String) - Method in class microui.core.base.Container
Adds a ContentView to the container with specified layout parameters and text ID.
addBufferedView(BufferedView) - Method in class microui.core.GraphicsBuffer
Adds a BufferedView to be rendered to this graphics buffer.
addLine(String) - Method in class microui.core.controller.MultiLineTextController
Adds a new line with the specified text at the end.
addLine(String) - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Adds a new line with the specified text at the end of the text.
addListener(EventType, Listener) - Method in class microui.event.InteractionHandler
Adds a listener for a specific event type.
addMenu(String, String...) - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Adds a sub-menu to the menu with the specified items.
addMenu(String, PImage, String...) - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Adds a sub-menu with an icon and items to the menu.
ALL - Enum constant in enum class microui.core.controller.FullSingleLineTextController.ValidationMode
Allow letters, digits, and standard special characters.
append(float) - Method in class microui.util.BoundedValue
Appends a value to the current value.
appendHeight(float) - Method in class microui.core.base.SpatialView
Appends a delta value to the height.
appendHeight(float, float, float) - Method in class microui.core.base.SpatialView
Appends a delta value to the height within specified bounds.
appendSize(float) - Method in class microui.core.base.SpatialView
Appends a delta value to both width and height.
appendSize(float, float, float) - Method in class microui.core.base.SpatialView
Appends a delta value to both width and height within specified bounds.
appendValue(float) - Method in class microui.core.RangeControl
Appends (adds) a value to the current value.
appendWidth(float) - Method in class microui.core.base.SpatialView
Appends a delta value to the width.
appendWidth(float, float, float) - Method in class microui.core.base.SpatialView
Appends a delta value to the width within specified bounds.
appendX(float) - Method in class microui.core.base.SpatialView
Appends a delta value to the x-coordinate.
appendX(float, float, float) - Method in class microui.core.base.SpatialView
Appends a delta value to the x-coordinate within specified bounds.
appendY(float) - Method in class microui.core.base.SpatialView
Appends a delta value to the y-coordinate.
appendY(float, float, float) - Method in class microui.core.base.SpatialView
Appends a delta value to the y-coordinate within specified bounds.
apply() - Method in class microui.core.style.AbstractColor
Applies this color as a fill to the main Processing context.
apply() - Method in class microui.core.style.Stroke
Applies this stroke style to the main Processing context.
apply(PGraphics) - Method in class microui.core.style.AbstractColor
Applies this color as a fill to the specified PGraphics context.
apply(PGraphics) - Method in class microui.core.style.Stroke
Applies this stroke style to the specified PGraphics context.
applyBackground() - Method in class microui.core.style.AbstractColor
Applies this color as a background to the main Processing context.
applyBackground(PGraphics) - Method in class microui.core.style.AbstractColor
Applies this color as a background to the specified PGraphics context.
applyStroke() - Method in class microui.core.style.AbstractColor
Applies this color as a stroke to the main Processing context.
applyStroke(PGraphics) - Method in class microui.core.style.AbstractColor
Applies this color as a stroke to the specified PGraphics context.
applyTint() - Method in class microui.core.style.AbstractColor
Applies this color as a tint to the main Processing context.
applyTint(PGraphics) - Method in class microui.core.style.AbstractColor
Applies this color as a tint to the specified PGraphics context.
AUTO - Enum constant in enum class microui.component.MenuButton.DirectionMode
Automatically choose direction based on available space.
AutoResizeMode - Enum Class in microui.constants
Enumeration defining the scaling factors for automatic text resizing in UI components.
